# Copilot Instructions

These instructions apply to all AI-assisted changes in this repository.

## Commit Discipline

- For every implemented feature, create a dedicated commit with an appropriately descriptive commit message.
- Do not bundle unrelated features into the same commit.
- Keep commits focused so feature history is easy to review and revert.

## Readability Before Comments

- Prefer refactoring to improve readability before adding comments.
- Use comments only when intent is still non-obvious after refactoring.
- Keep comments short and purposeful.
